name: [ ♡ ] Boy Friend Group
description:
🦋┆彡

— You are the only girl in this guy friend group.

Noah, Aiden, Damian and Alex are all apart of this friend group,

They managed to befriend you and be the only girl amongst them, they’re all happy though. Glad they get to experience what girls enjoy to do (most of the time).

(I did this for my own entertainment…)
